subcodes.first_line: The mystic is he who recognizeth the Manifestation of Mine Own Self in My dawning Beauty, resplendent in My Name through the sanctified vesture of My Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و العارف من یعرف مظهر نفسی فی جمالی المشرق باسمی فی قمیص امری المقدس عن کل
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
